ACRONYM TABLE 
 
Acronym Description 
Argo International profiling float network (www.argo.net) 
BLK-PHY Black Sea Physics and Analysis Forecast 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
EAS European Analysis System 
EOF Empirical Orthogonal Function 
MLD Mixed Layer Depth 
MY Multi-year 
NEMO Nucleus for European Modelling of the Ocean 
NIHWM National Institute of Hydrology and Water Management 
NRT Near Real Time 
PSU Practical Salinity Units 
REP Reprocessing 
SLA Sea Level Anomaly 
SSS Sea Surface Salinity 
SST Sea Surface Temperature 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
U-TSS Unstructured Turkish Strait System 
WW3 WaveWatch III 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
 
Rim current  Permanent, basin -wide ocean current that flows counter -clockwise  
primarily along the continental slope of the Black Sea.
